meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build a high-impact developer portfolio. Solve the no-portfolio problem with our expert-led, step-by-step guide.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold and deploy production-grade SaaS components. By leveraging Antigravity to map architecture, you can generate high-value, complex codebases that demonstrate technical authority, proving your capabilities to stakeholders and clients far faster than manual development ever could.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the modern SaaS landscape is that your resume is irrelevant. If you don't have a live, functioning product, you are invisible to investors and enterprise clients alike. The 'no portfolio' trap is a silent killer of ambition, trapping talented founders in a cycle of theoretical planning while competitors ship real code.

But the game has changed. By synthesizing Claude Code with Antigravity, you can move from a blank screen to a functional, high-complexity MVP in hours. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about weaponizing AI to build a portfolio of shipped, scalable architecture that proves your worth as a builder.

steps.title: Define High-Value Architectural Scope
steps.description: Don't build a 'to-do' list. Use Antigravity to outline a complex SaaS component, like a multi-tenant authentication dashboard or a real-time data visualizer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Architect a high-performance, multi-tenant SaaS dashboard component using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Define the database schema, API routes, and security middleware requirements.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Core Infrastructure
steps.description: Use Claude Code to establish the foundational boilerplate, ensuring strict adherence to modern clean-code standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the folder structure and configuration files for a scalable, modular frontend architecture. Include unit testing setup and environment variable validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "setup initial directory structure with strict TypeScript configuration"

steps.title: Implement Complex Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'hard' parts—state management and external API integrations—that demonstrate senior-level engineering capability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a robust state management layer using React Query to handle async server state, including optimistic updates and error boundaries.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "write the hook for data fetching with React Query and implement error handling for API failures"

steps.title: Optimize for Performance and Accessibility
steps.description: A portfolio project must be performant. Use Claude Code to audit and refactor your code for Lighthouse score optimization.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks, accessibility violations (WCAG), and bundle size optimization strategies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "audit current components for accessibility issues and implement performance optimizations"

steps.title: Automate Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: A portfolio piece isn't complete without a live URL and a professional README that explains your technical decisions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive README.md that details the architecture, design patterns used, and the business problem solved by this project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate a professional README.md highlighting the technical architecture and business impact of this SaaS module"

pro_tips: Always commit your code in small, atomic chunks using Claude Code to create a clean, professional Git history that recruiters can inspect.
Inject 'opinionated' architectural decisions into your prompts—like choosing Zod for schema validation—to show you understand real-world production safety.
Include a 'Technical Decisions' section in your README; explaining 'why' you chose a technology is more impressive than just writing the code.
Use Claude Code to generate mock data that simulates enterprise-scale loads, proving your code handles more than just 'Hello World'.
Treat every portfolio project as a product launch; include a live demo link and a video walkthrough of the features.
content.next_steps: Once you have your first module live, repeat this process for three distinct SaaS verticals to build a diverse 'Engineering Authority' portfolio that signals senior-level competence.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting a lack of portfolio hold your venture back. Leverage the power of AI to ship, scale, and succeed. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
